channel.title: Weeklypedia
channel.description: The most edited Wikipedia articles and discussions from the last week

item.title: Weeklypedia - April 17, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 74,282 authors made 776,480 changes to 410,801 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election (1,698 changes by 328 authors)
  2. String Quartets (Schoenberg) (667 changes by 2 authors)
  3. Frank Tanti (517 changes by 3 authors)
  4. Deaths in 2026 (440 changes by 84 authors)
  5. List of people from Cincinnati (418 changes by 3 authors)
  6. 2026 Iran war (381 changes by 60 authors)
  7. 2026 Onikişubat school shooting (371 changes by 102 authors)
  8. Portugal (350 changes by 14 authors)
  9. Artemis II (313 changes by 94 authors)
  10. 2026 Peruvian general election (305 changes by 68 authors)
  11. MikroTik (304 changes by 1 authors)
  12. 2026 World Snooker Championship (301 changes by 16 authors)
  13. Eric Swalwell (292 changes by 96 authors)
  14. 2026 California gubernatorial election (283 changes by 87 authors)
  15. Tisza Party (251 changes by 99 authors)
  16. List of flags by design (243 changes by 3 authors)
  17. 2026 West Bengal Legislative Assembly election (223 changes by 52 authors)
  18. Viktor Orbán (216 changes by 105 authors)
  19. Modernist film (213 changes by 8 authors)
  20. Péter Magyar (207 changes by 106 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Kahramanmaraş school shooting (372 changes by 102 authors)
  2. Islamabad Talks (186 changes by 57 authors)
  3. 2018–19 Liga Nacional Superior de Voleibol Femenino (137 changes by 1 authors)
  4. Nizar Amedi (129 changes by 38 authors)
  5. 2017–18 Liga Nacional Superior de Voleibol Femenino (123 changes by 1 authors)
  6. Naval blockade of Iran (121 changes by 40 authors)
  7. 2026 Siverek school shooting (119 changes by 60 authors)
  8. Elena Kostyleva (116 changes by 4 authors)
  9. 2026 United States–Holy See rift (112 changes by 20 authors)
  10. List of Billboard Global 200 top-ten singles in 2025 (100 changes by 1 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. 2026 Iran war
  2. Zionism
  3. Donald Trump
  4. Eric Swalwell
  5. Rubellia Bassa

item.title: Weeklypedia - April 10, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 71,683 authors made 786,149 changes to 415,303 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Iran war (556 changes by 137 authors)
  2. Deaths in 2026 (545 changes by 79 authors)
  3. Artemis II (500 changes by 159 authors)
  4. Ann Dallas (418 changes by 2 authors)
  5. Tele7ABC (393 changes by 2 authors)
  6. List of people from Cincinnati (376 changes by 3 authors)
  7. 2026 Badminton Asia Championships (373 changes by 15 authors)
  8. Islamabad Accord (2026) (365 changes by 68 authors)
  9. 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election (344 changes by 54 authors)
  10. Hudson's Bay point blanket (341 changes by 6 authors)
  11. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie (321 changes by 96 authors)
  12. 2026 U.S. pilot rescue operation in Iran (303 changes by 81 authors)
  13. List of game designers (285 changes by 5 authors)
  14. Amrit Bharat Station Scheme (283 changes by 2 authors)
  15. 2026 Monte-Carlo Masters – Singles (246 changes by 31 authors)
  16. Rollo Peters (246 changes by 2 authors)
  17. 2026 West Bengal Legislative Assembly election (245 changes by 63 authors)
  18. Hello, World (photograph) (244 changes by 86 authors)
  19. Charles Thau (234 changes by 3 authors)
  20. 2026 AFC U-20 Women's Asian Cup (226 changes by 22 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. Islamabad Accord (2026) (366 changes by 68 authors)
  2. 2026 U.S. pilot rescue operation in Iran (304 changes by 81 authors)
  3. Rollo Peters (247 changes by 2 authors)
  4. 2026 Monte-Carlo Masters – Singles (247 changes by 31 authors)
  5. Hello, World (NASA) (245 changes by 87 authors)
  6. 2026 European Badminton Championships (156 changes by 6 authors)
  7. 2026 Badminton Asia Championships - Qualification (153 changes by 5 authors)
  8. Names of Java (139 changes by 3 authors)
  9. Pelourinho Novo (130 changes by 2 authors)
  10. 2026 Rock League season (115 changes by 5 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Republican Party (United States)
  2. 2026 Iran war
  3. Artemis II
  4. Donald Trump
  5. Mathematics

item.title: Weeklypedia - April 3, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 73,829 authors made 775,080 changes to 417,966 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. Deaths in 2026 (594 changes by 88 authors)
  2. 2026 No Kings protests (582 changes by 133 authors)
  3. 2026 Iran war (441 changes by 118 authors)
  4. 2026 West Bengal Legislative Assembly election (436 changes by 55 authors)
  5. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie (424 changes by 102 authors)
  6. 2026 Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly election (380 changes by 26 authors)
  7. Statue of Liberty in popular culture (352 changes by 14 authors)
  8. Sharaa family (345 changes by 5 authors)
  9. List of Reading Rainbow episodes (341 changes by 3 authors)
  10. Bully (album) (267 changes by 74 authors)
  11. Kawi script (254 changes by 4 authors)
  12. List of game designers (251 changes by 5 authors)
  13. Artemis II (250 changes by 115 authors)
  14. WrestleMania 42 (245 changes by 83 authors)
  15. 2026 Credit One Charleston Open – Singles (228 changes by 25 authors)
  16. Gil Mains (218 changes by 1 authors)
  17. List of ships of the People's Liberation Army Navy (215 changes by 3 authors)
  18. List of sovereign states headed by Elizabeth II (213 changes by 7 authors)
  19. List of Donald Trump 2024 presidential campaign endorsements by former officials (205 changes by 2 authors)
  20. 2026 FIFA Series (men's matches) (203 changes by 63 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Credit One Charleston Open – Singles (229 changes by 25 authors)
  2. 2026 Copa Colsanitas – Singles (134 changes by 29 authors)
  3. TOI-1853 b (118 changes by 5 authors)
  4. 2026 U.S. Men's Clay Court Championships – Singles (115 changes by 20 authors)
  5. Penal Bill (Amendment No. 159) (Death Penalty for Terrorists), 2025 (115 changes by 25 authors)
  6. Pere (name) (109 changes by 3 authors)
  7. Edinburgh plague of 1585 (103 changes by 3 authors)
  8. 2022–23 World Rugby Sevens Series squads (93 changes by 3 authors)
  9. 2026 Grand Prix Hassan II – Singles (85 changes by 17 authors)
  10. List of Buddhist Academy Award winners and nominees (85 changes by 2 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Donald Trump
  2. 2026 Iran war
  3. Zionism
  4. Statue of Liberty in popular culture
  5. Ashkenazi Jews

item.title: Weeklypedia - March 27, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 74,603 authors made 821,275 changes to 445,512 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. Air Canada Express Flight 8646 (748 changes by 215 authors)
  2. Deaths in 2026 (640 changes by 93 authors)
  3. 2026 Kerala Legislative Assembly election (518 changes by 98 authors)
  4. 2026 Iran war (468 changes by 118 authors)
  5. Dhurandhar: The Revenge (390 changes by 71 authors)
  6. Chuck Norris (345 changes by 144 authors)
  7. List of Order of the Coif members (305 changes by 2 authors)
  8. 2026 Miami Open – Men's singles (300 changes by 46 authors)
  9. 2026 Danish general election (284 changes by 50 authors)
  10. 2026 Colombian Air Force Lockeed C-130 crash (280 changes by 72 authors)
  11. 2026 NCAA Division I men's basketball tournament (273 changes by 54 authors)
  12. Charles Thau (270 changes by 17 authors)
  13. 2026 Miami Open – Women's singles (270 changes by 36 authors)
  14. 2026 South Australian state election (251 changes by 62 authors)
  15. 2026 United States House of Representatives elections in California (244 changes by 26 authors)
  16. 2026 Puducherry Legislative Assembly election (234 changes by 41 authors)
  17. 2026 South Australian House of Assembly election (219 changes by 15 authors)
  18. Mermaid Melody Pichi Pichi Pitch (213 changes by 4 authors)
  19. Markwayne Mullin (211 changes by 36 authors)
  20. Project Hail Mary (film) (208 changes by 105 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. Air Canada Flight 8646 (749 changes by 215 authors)
  2. 2026 Colombian Air Force Lockeed C-130 crash (281 changes by 72 authors)
  3. Lucia Simonelli (187 changes by 11 authors)
  4. Alan Armstrong (politician) (118 changes by 46 authors)
  5. List of Puerto Rican Grammy Award winners and nominees (114 changes by 6 authors)
  6. Power: The Downfall of Huw Edwards (112 changes by 5 authors)
  7. List of non-canonical characters in the One Piece franchise (86 changes by 9 authors)
  8. Beating the Street (84 changes by 2 authors)
  9. Programming Without Coding Technology (software) (82 changes by 2 authors)
  10. Case of Noelia Castillo (78 changes by 30 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Dhurandhar: The Revenge
  2. 2026 Iran war
  3. Donald Trump
  4. Air Canada Flight 8646
  5. Republican Party (United States)

item.title: Weeklypedia - March 20, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 74,043 authors made 746,096 changes to 373,426 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Iran war (845 changes by 175 authors)
  2. 2026 West Bengal Legislative Assembly election (645 changes by 90 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Kabul hospital airstrike (211 changes by 53 authors)
  2. Nilma Dole-Williams (208 changes by 14 authors)
  3. List of The Dickey Club members (133 changes by 1 authors)
  4. Results of the 2001 New Zealand regional council elections (130 changes by 4 authors)

  6. 2024 Bradford Bulls season (100 changes by 3 authors)
  7. Timeline of the Israel–Hezbollah conflict (2 March 2026 – present) (99 changes by 7 authors)
  8. 2026 Kent meningitis outbreak (98 changes by 28 authors)
  9. Room in Brooklyn (96 changes by 4 authors)
  10. Joshua Baker (Mississippi politician) (92 changes by 1 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. 2026 Iran war
  2. Ali Larijani
  3. Donald Trump
  4. Professor Jiang
  5. Benjamin Netanyahu

item.title: Weeklypedia - March 13, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 74,993 authors made 765,935 changes to 392,721 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Iran war (1,911 changes by 288 authors)

  18. Country Joe McDonald (234 changes by 45 authors)
  19. Gwen Wakeling (219 changes by 1 authors)
  20. 2026 Ruichang China Masters (219 changes by 8 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. Helene Pons (273 changes by 5 authors)
  2. 2026 Ruichang China Masters (220 changes by 8 authors)
  3. Temple Israel synagogue shooting (204 changes by 44 authors)
  4. 2026 Old Dominion University shooting (119 changes by 20 authors)
  5. Bam Adebayo's 83-point game (115 changes by 50 authors)
  6. Edward Jacob "Jake" Lang (108 changes by 29 authors)
  7. Anthony Russell (murderer) (91 changes by 34 authors)
  8. Clemence Acland (87 changes by 5 authors)
  9. 2026 Glasgow fire (87 changes by 20 authors)
  10. Dark Auction (83 changes by 6 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. 2026 Iran war
  2. Donald Trump
  3. Gaza genocide
  4. Mojtaba Khamenei
  5. 2026 Minab school airstrike

item.title: Weeklypedia - March 6, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 73,878 authors made 848,553 changes to 474,932 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Tehran explosions (5,565 changes by 719 authors)
  2. Deaths in 2026 (731 changes by 128 authors)
  3. Assassination of Ali Khamenei (731 changes by 215 authors)
  4. Ali Khamenei (685 changes by 240 authors)
  5. Israeli attack on girls' elementary school in Minab (398 changes by 104 authors)
  6. Reactions to the 2026 Iran conflict (385 changes by 99 authors)
  7. 2026 Gorton and Denton by-election (377 changes by 79 authors)
  8. Timeline of the 2026 Iran conflict (373 changes by 52 authors)
  9. 2026 United States House of Representatives elections (340 changes by 34 authors)
  10. Prelude to the 2026 Iran conflict (327 changes by 127 authors)
  11. Elimination Chamber (2026) (323 changes by 90 authors)
  12. 2026 Men's T20 World Cup (320 changes by 37 authors)
  13. Interim Leadership Council (318 changes by 77 authors)
  14. 2026 United States House of Representatives elections in Texas (318 changes by 54 authors)
  15. 2026 BNP Paribas Open – Women's singles (317 changes by 31 authors)
  16. Timeline of the Gaza war (3 October 2025 – present) (316 changes by 4 authors)
  17. List of people named in the Epstein files (309 changes by 25 authors)
  18. Sinking of IRIS Dena (307 changes by 103 authors)
  19. 2026 BNP Paribas Open – Men's singles (292 changes by 29 authors)
  20. Mojtaba Khamenei (285 changes by 122 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Tehran explosions (5,566 changes by 719 authors)
  2. Assassination of Ali Khamenei (732 changes by 215 authors)
  3. Israeli attack on girls' elementary school in Minab (399 changes by 104 authors)
  4. Reactions to the 2026 Israeli–United States strikes on Iran (386 changes by 99 authors)
  5. Timeline of the 2026 Israeli–United States strikes on Iran (374 changes by 52 authors)
  6. Interim Leadership Council (319 changes by 77 authors)
  7. Sinking of IRIS Dena (308 changes by 103 authors)
  8. 2026 Austin bar shooting (284 changes by 50 authors)
  9. Wedding of Mary, Queen of Scots, and the Earl of Bothwell (228 changes by 3 authors)
  10. 2026 Iranian leadership crisis (221 changes by 86 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. 2026 Israeli strikes on Iran
  2. Ali Khamenei
  3. Assassination of Ali Khamenei
  4. 2026 Minab school airstrike
  5. 2026 Afghanistan–Pakistan war

item.title: Weeklypedia - February 27, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 76,398 authors made 873,111 changes to 485,693 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. Deaths in 2026 (536 changes by 91 authors)
  2. Jean Constantin (472 changes by 2 authors)
  3. 2026 Gorton and Denton by-election (414 changes by 106 authors)

  8. Perdido Street Station (273 changes by 2 authors)
  9. Dewi Evans (269 changes by 12 authors)
  10. Johns Manville (268 changes by 3 authors)
  11. Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes (263 changes by 144 authors)

  14. List of people named in the Epstein files (230 changes by 40 authors)
  15. 2026 Afghanistan–Pakistan conflict (215 changes by 60 authors)
  16. Timeline of the Gaza war (3 October 2025 – present) (211 changes by 5 authors)
  17. Restore Britain (206 changes by 44 authors)
  18. Eileen Gu (198 changes by 69 authors)
  19. Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (189 changes by 7 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Jalisco operation (344 changes by 112 authors)
  2. 2026 Afghanistan–Pakistan conflict (216 changes by 60 authors)
  3. Georgian slang (186 changes by 3 authors)
  4. 2026 Mar-a-Lago shooting (171 changes by 31 authors)

  6. 2026 Dubai Tennis Championships – Men's singles (121 changes by 19 authors)

  8. 2026 ATX Open – Singles (116 changes by 12 authors)
  9. 2026 Abierto Mexicano Telcel – Singles (113 changes by 15 authors)
  10. List of United States post offices in New Jersey (104 changes by 2 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Zionism
  2. List of people named in the Epstein files
  3. Ideological bias on Wikipedia
  4. Elliot Rodger/GA1
  5. Restore Britain

item.title: Weeklypedia - February 20, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 75,104 authors made 797,675 changes to 419,139 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Men's T20 World Cup (659 changes by 56 authors)

item.title: Weeklypedia - February 13, 2026
item.description:
Articles

This week, 76,934 authors made 745,614 changes to 371,040 different articles. The top 20 articles for the week:

  1. 2026 Tumbler Ridge school shooting (1,108 changes by 260 authors)
  2. 2026 Men's T20 World Cup (669 changes by 48 authors)
  3. Deaths in 2026 (499 changes by 91 authors)
  4. Prominent individuals mentioned in the Epstein files (465 changes by 60 authors)
  5. 2026 Bangladeshi general election (462 changes by 60 authors)
  6. Super Bowl LX (408 changes by 137 authors)
  7. Super Bowl LX halftime show (394 changes by 106 authors)
  8. 2026 Japanese general election (390 changes by 116 authors)
  9. Wimmera Football League (373 changes by 4 authors)
  10. Nile (362 changes by 6 authors)
  11. 2025 Bondi Beach shooting (308 changes by 29 authors)
  12. 2026 Qatar TotalEnergies Open – Singles (295 changes by 29 authors)
  13. United States at the 2026 Winter Olympics (292 changes by 30 authors)
  14. Disappearance of Nancy Guthrie (282 changes by 88 authors)

  16. 2026 Winter Olympics opening ceremony (262 changes by 102 authors)
  17. Bicentennial Capitol Mall State Park (261 changes by 4 authors)
  18. Madan Paliwal (258 changes by 7 authors)
  19. James Van Der Beek (242 changes by 74 authors)
  20. Figure skating at the 2026 Winter Olympics – Team event (231 changes by 25 authors)

New Articles

The ten most actively edited articles created within the last week

  1. 2026 Tumbler Ridge school shooting (1,109 changes by 260 authors)
  2. 2026 Islamabad suicide bombing (189 changes by 77 authors)
  3. Progresses of Mary, Queen of Scots (139 changes by 1 authors)
  4. 2026 Liberal Party of Australia leadership spill motion (133 changes by 36 authors)
  5. 2026 ABN AMRO Open – Singles (114 changes by 17 authors)
  6. 2009 Italian Beach Soccer League (101 changes by 5 authors)
  7. 2026 Argentina Open – Singles (95 changes by 12 authors)
  8. 2026 Dallas Open – Singles (92 changes by 13 authors)
  9. List of United States post offices in Virginia (77 changes by 1 authors)
  10. Benjamin Farar Sr. (75 changes by 6 authors)

Discussions

The most active discussions:

  1. Imane Khelif
  2. 2026 Tumbler Ridge school shooting
  3. Twitter
  4. Prominent individuals mentioned in the Epstein files
  5. Killing of Alex Pretti
